title: Bothan Friendship Award
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Bothan Friendship Award''' was an award given by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] to non-Bothans who exhibited stealth and other Bothan activities. [[Koth Melan]] and members of the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]] honored [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] with this award after installing a listening device to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Communications satellite]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
